query:
SELECT DISTINCT
                u.id AS "id!: Uuid",
                u.email AS "email!",
                u.first_name
                ,
                u.username
            FROM notifications n
            JOIN users u ON u.id = n.user_id
            WHERE n.created_at >= $1
              AND n.created_at < $2
              AND n.dismissed_at IS NULL
              AND n.seen = FALSE
            ORDER BY u.id
